eas_text: A civil authority has issued A LOCAL AREA EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Fremont, WY; at 04:21 PM ON FEB 7, 2026 Effective until 06:21 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Fremont Cty Emergency Mgmt: Evacuate immediately east of Red Crow Lane to Highway 789 and everything north of Goes In Lodge Road, south to the Chemtrade acid plant, and east to Highway 789.  Leave now and follow directions from emergency personnel.  Call 307-856-4891 or visit County 10 for updates.  Stay informed via local news.
